name: GIGABYTE X870 AORUS STEALTH ICE ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - Support DDR5-8200+(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - 2x USB4 Type-C (DP Alt mode) - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 5GbE LAN - Qualcomm 802.11be Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.3
shortName: GIGABYTE X870 AORUS STEALTH ICE ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x
description: Enthusiast-grade AM5 ATX motherboard with X870 chipset, PCIe 5.0, and dual USB4 ports for high-performance systems.
